code:
import io
import string

fn main() -> Unit
  let line = match io.read_line()
  when Some(s)
    s
  when None
    ""
  end

  mut product = 1
  mut current = 0
  mut sign = 1
  mut has_digits = false
  mut i = 0
  let n = string.len(line)

  while i <= n
    mut b = 0
    if i < n
      b = match string.byte_at(line, i)
      when Some(v)
        v
      when None
        32
      end
    else
      b = 32
    end

    let is_space = b == 32 or b == 9 or b == 10 or b == 13
    let is_digit = b >= 48 and b <= 57
    let is_minus = b == 45
    let is_plus = b == 43

    if is_space
      if has_digits
        product = product * (sign * current)
      end
      current = 0
      sign = 1
      has_digits = false
    else if is_digit
      current = current * 10 + (b - 48)
      has_digits = true
    else if is_minus
      sign = -1
    else if is_plus
      sign = 1
    end

    i = i + 1
  end

  println("product=#{product}")
end
